reply 3121017165 '> `cachedResult()` always sets `truncated_turns: 0`, even if the cached summary frontmatter has `truncated_turns` from a previous chunking/truncation run.

Addressed: cached summary results now read `degraded`, `chunked`, and `truncated_turns` directly from the cached summary frontmatter for all cached paths, including user-edited summaries. Added a JSON regression test.'

reply 3121017189 '> sessions with a valid but abbreviated checkpoint id will incorrectly fall back to `uncommittedChanges()`

Addressed: capture now treats 7-40 hex checkpoint IDs as diffable refs and uses `filesChangedSince()` for abbreviated Entire checkpoints. Added a clean-repo regression test for an abbreviated checkpoint trailer.'

reply 3121021586 '> The migration cleanup currently drops any log line from the same date as the error file, not just the line for that session.

Addressed: migration cleanup now removes only session log lines whose final marker exactly matches the migrated file marker. It no longer deletes by date or substring, and the migration test keeps unrelated same-day history.'

reply 3121021588 '> `summarizeAll` treats every `sessions/*.md` file as a manifest, but upgraded vaults can still contain legacy session markdown until migration is run.

Addressed: `summarize --all` now validates session files up front and skips non-manifest markdown before iterating. Added a mixed-vault regression test with a legacy session file.'

reply 3121023350 '> The logic for identifying and removing log entries during migration is overly broad and potentially destructive.

Addressed: log pruning is now constrained to exact 8+ character session markers in the final log field. The broad date-prefix and substring deletion paths were removed, with coverage for preserving unrelated same-day log entries.'

reply 3121023352 '> Spawning a shell subprocess to check for executable existence on the PATH is inefficient and less portable.

Addressed: doctor now temporarily sets the hook PATH and uses `Bun.which("bun")` directly instead of spawning a shell subprocess.'

reply 3121023356 '> This test file depends on the `git` CLI.

Addressed: `tests/git.test.ts` now preflights `Bun.which("git")` and skips the git-dependent suites when the CLI is unavailable.'

reply 3121023357 '> This test file depends on the `git` CLI for repository setup.

Addressed: `tests/capture-session.test.ts` now preflights `Bun.which("git")` and skips the capture-session suite when git is unavailable.'

reply 3121023359 '> `manifestExistsForSession` performs a linear scan of the `sessions/` directory, reading and parsing every manifest file to check for a duplicate `session_id`.

Addressed: the idempotency scan now narrows candidates by the generated `-<shortSessionId>.md` suffix before parsing manifests, falling back to the full scan only for unshortenable IDs.'","workdir":"/Users/justinbeaudry/Projects/cairn","yield_time_ms":1000,"max_output_tokens":30000}

reply 3121017165 '> `cachedResult()` always sets `truncated_turns: 0`, even if the cached summary frontmatter has `truncated_turns` from a previous chunking/truncation run.

Addressed: cached summary results now read `degraded`, `chunked`, and `truncated_turns` directly from the cached summary frontmatter for all cached paths, including user-edited summaries. Added a JSON regression test.'

reply 3121017189 '> sessions with a valid but abbreviated checkpoint id will incorrectly fall back to `uncommittedChanges()`

Addressed: capture now treats 7-40 hex checkpoint IDs as diffable refs and uses `filesChangedSince()` for abbreviated Entire checkpoints. Added a clean-repo regression test for an abbreviated checkpoint trailer.'

reply 3121021586 '> The migration cleanup currently drops any log line from the same date as the error file, not just the line for that session.

Addressed: migration cleanup now removes only session log lines whose final marker exactly matches the migrated file marker. It no longer deletes by date or substring, and the migration test keeps unrelated same-day history.'

reply 3121021588 '> `summarizeAll` treats every `sessions/*.md` file as a manifest, but upgraded vaults can still contain legacy session markdown until migration is run.

Addressed: `summarize --all` now validates session files up front and skips non-manifest markdown before iterating. Added a mixed-vault regression test with a legacy session file.'

reply 3121023350 '> The logic for identifying and removing log entries during migration is overly broad and potentially destructive.

Addressed: log pruning is now constrained to exact 8+ character session markers in the final log field. The broad date-prefix and substring deletion paths were removed, with coverage for preserving unrelated same-day log entries.'

reply 3121023352 '> Spawning a shell subprocess to check for executable existence on the PATH is inefficient and less portable.

Addressed: doctor now temporarily sets the hook PATH and uses `Bun.which("bun")` directly instead of spawning a shell subprocess.'

reply 3121023356 '> This test file depends on the `git` CLI.

Addressed: `tests/git.test.ts` now preflights `Bun.which("git")` and skips the git-dependent suites when the CLI is unavailable.'

reply 3121023357 '> This test file depends on the `git` CLI for repository setup.

Addressed: `tests/capture-session.test.ts` now preflights `Bun.which("git")` and skips the capture-session suite when git is unavailable.'

reply 3121023359 '> `manifestExistsForSession` performs a linear scan of the `sessions/` directory, reading and parsing every manifest file to check for a duplicate `session_id`.

Addressed: the idempotency scan now narrows candidates by the generated `-<shortSessionId>.md` suffix before parsing manifests, falling back to the full scan only for unshortenable IDs.'

payload.message:
Resolved 9 of 9 PR review threads on PR #3 and pushed follow-up commit `a24ce5a`.

Fixed:
- Cached summary JSON now preserves `truncated_turns`.
- `summarize --all` skips legacy/non-manifest session markdown.
- Capture supports abbreviated Entire checkpoint SHAs.
- Manifest idempotency scan filters by `-<shortSessionId>.md` before parsing.
- Migration log pruning now removes only exact session-marker lines.
- Doctor uses `Bun.which()` instead of a subprocess.
- Git-dependent tests now skip when `git` is unavailable.

Validation passed:
- `bun test tests/summarize.test.ts tests/capture-session.test.ts tests/migrate-sessions.test.ts tests/doctor.test.ts tests/git.test.ts` -> 42 passed
- `bun run lint && bun run test` -> 111 passed

I replied to and resolved all inline threads; re-fetch shows no unresolved review threads. Unrelated local edits in `skills/`, `templates/`, and the two untracked docs files remain unstaged.

content.text:
Resolved 9 of 9 PR review threads on PR #3 and pushed follow-up commit `a24ce5a`.

Fixed:
- Cached summary JSON now preserves `truncated_turns`.
- `summarize --all` skips legacy/non-manifest session markdown.
- Capture supports abbreviated Entire checkpoint SHAs.
- Manifest idempotency scan filters by `-<shortSessionId>.md` before parsing.
- Migration log pruning now removes only exact session-marker lines.
- Doctor uses `Bun.which()` instead of a subprocess.
- Git-dependent tests now skip when `git` is unavailable.

Validation passed:
- `bun test tests/summarize.test.ts tests/capture-session.test.ts tests/migrate-sessions.test.ts tests/doctor.test.ts tests/git.test.ts` -> 42 passed
- `bun run lint && bun run test` -> 111 passed

I replied to and resolved all inline threads; re-fetch shows no unresolved review threads. Unrelated local edits in `skills/`, `templates/`, and the two untracked docs files remain unstaged.
